title: centaurea ceratophylla
intro: Centaurea ceratophylla, also known as Knapweed or Rough Knapweed, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea ceratophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
